title: Stallari Catalog Entry
description: Schema for entries in the registry catalog (plugins/*.json). Supports both plugin and pack types via discriminated union on the 'type' field.

then.description: DD-265 belt-and-braces: library form factor requires an SPM dependency in stallari-harness/Package.swift — only first-party builds can produce library blades.

type.description: Entry type. Plugins provide MCP tools; packs are workflow manifests.

license.description: SPDX license identifier. Required for plugins.

contract.description: Domain contract identifier. Required for plugins.

runtime.description: Runtime kind. 'library' (DD-265) means the plugin is compiled into the Stallari daemon binary via SPM — never fetched, never installed; the consumer is the daemon process itself.

bundled_in.description: DD-265: name of the Stallari binary that compiles this library blade in (e.g. 'stallari-harness'). Set only when runtime == 'library'.

then.description: DD-265: library-runtime entries MUST NOT carry binary or package — the consumer is the daemon binary itself, not a separately-fetched artefact.

consent_tile_link.description: DD-265: deep-link (e.g. 'stallari://settings/general/local-corpus/mail') opened by the marketplace Manage button when runtime == 'library'. Optional — absence means render a passive Bundled tile with no Manage button (vault form factor).

author_type.description: Authorship class. DD-265: required for runtime == 'library' (must be 'first-party' — only first-party builds can edit Package.swift).

hidden.description: When true, the entry is excluded from the marketplace catalog build.

services.description: Abstract service names this entry provides or uses.

pack_spec.description: Pack spec version (e.g. "1.0"). Present only for type=pack.

skill_count.description: Number of skills in this pack. Present only for type=pack.

conformance.description: Contract conformance test results. Primarily for plugins.

inference.description: Optional inference declaration for entries that embed LLM calls.

setup_complexity.description: Setup complexity from plugin setup.complexity. 'none' = no credentials needed. Null = not declared.

auth_model.description: Primary authentication model from plugin setup metadata.

credential_count.description: Number of credential fields required. 0 = no setup needed.
